imgs/cd88aa8e.subject: heater
imgs/cd88aa8e.notes: The shot is well-centered but includes a distracting reflection in the stove glass and uneven exposure.

imgs/b0331afd.subject: interior
imgs/b0331afd.notes: The wide-angle perspective effectively captures the tiered bench layout and interior materials, though the vertical lines are slightly skewed.

imgs/a8e67e63.subject: interior
imgs/a8e67e63.notes: The composition is clear, but construction debris visible through the glass door detracts from the professional aesthetic.

imgs/a3eff6dd.subject: interior
imgs/a3eff6dd.notes: The harsh work light and visible power strip/cords make the composition look unfinished and unprofessional.
